actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour component id 1865680029 on GameObject 'Room_Modern' (PrefabInstance id 1865680026) corresponds to the provided PlayQuickSound script. Preconditions: an AudioSource component exists on the same GameObject (required by [RequireComponent]) and the 'sound' AudioClip field is assigned; OnValidate sets playOnAwake=false; Awake caches the AudioSource. Action: invoke PlayQuickSound.Play() to execute randomized pitch assignment and AudioSource.PlayOneShot(sound, volume). Expected: a one-shot sound plays at configured volume with pitch within [1 - randomPitchVariance, 1 + randomPitchVariance].
